noTablesDesc: Create your first table to get started

deleteTable.title: Delete Table
deleteTable.desc: Are you sure you want to delete table "{{name}}"? All data, API endpoints, webhooks, validation rules, and history linked to this table will be permanently deleted.

dropColumn.title: Drop Column
dropColumn.desc: Are you sure you want to drop column "{{name}}"? This will permanently delete all data in this column.

errors.INCOMPATIBLE_TYPE: Cannot convert column "{{column}}" to {{type}}: existing data is not compatible. Clear or update the data first, or choose a compatible type.
errors.HAS_NULL_VALUES: Column "{{column}}" contains NULL values and cannot be set to NOT NULL. Fill in the missing values first.
errors.HAS_DEPENDENTS: Column "{{column}}" has dependent objects (indexes, foreign keys, or views). Remove them first.
errors.HAS_DUPLICATES: Cannot add unique constraint on "{{column}}": duplicate values exist. Remove duplicates first.

indexes.title: Indexes
indexes.dropConfirm: Drop index "{{name}}"? This may affect query performance.
indexes.name: Name
indexes.selectColumns: Select columns to index. Multi-column indexes are useful for queries that filter by multiple fields at once.
indexes.uniqueHint: Prevents duplicate values in the indexed columns
indexes.description: Indexes speed up data queries. Without an index, the database scans every row. Pick columns you frequently filter, sort, or join by.
indexes.typeBtreeDesc: Universal index. Best for =, <, >, BETWEEN, ORDER BY. Use for most cases.
indexes.typeHashDesc: Optimized for strict equality (=). Faster than B-tree for exact lookups, but doesn't support sorting or ranges.
indexes.typeGinDesc: For full-text search, JSONB fields, and arrays. Enables fast LIKE/ILIKE queries on text.
indexes.typeGistDesc: For geometric data, ranges, and full-text search. Supports complex operators like overlap and containment.
indexes.recommendGin: Use for text search, JSONB, arrays
indexes.recommendGist: Use for ranges, geometry, spatial data

fk.title: Foreign Keys
fk.description: Foreign keys link tables together. For example, a user_id column in an orders table references id in the users table. This ensures you can't create an order for a non-existent user.
fk.dropConfirm: Drop relation "{{name}}"? Data won't be affected, but referential integrity will no longer be enforced.

actions.setNull: Set NULL in the related column
actions.restrict: Block action if related records exist
actions.noAction: Like RESTRICT, checked at end of transaction
actions.setDefault: Set the column to its default value

form.sourceColumnHint: Which column will reference another table
form.onDeleteHint: What to do when a referenced record is deleted
form.onUpdateHint: What to do when a referenced key changes
form.noEligibleColumns: No PK or UNIQUE columns (FK can only reference unique columns)

validation.title: Validation Rules
validation.description: Validation rules check data on insert and update. If data fails validation, the operation is rejected with an error message.
validation.errorMessageHint: Message shown to users when the rule is violated
validation.errorMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Value must be between 1 and 100
validation.dropConfirm: Delete this rule? Data will no longer be validated against it.
validation.columnHint: Which column this rule applies to

typeDesc.uniqueCombo: Prevent duplicate combinations of values across multiple columns
typeDesc.regex: Validate text against a regular expression pattern
typeDesc.range: Restrict a numeric value to a minimum and maximum
typeDesc.enum: Only allow values from a predefined list

configHints.uniqueCombo: Select columns whose combination must be unique
configHints.regex: POSIX regular expression. e.g. ^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$ for alphanumeric only
configHints.range: Set minimum and/or maximum allowed value
configHints.enum: List allowed values separated by commas
configHints.customExpression: SQL condition checked for each row. Use column names as variables
configHints.stateMachine: JSON object: keys are current states, values are arrays of allowed next states

versioning.title: Schema History
versioning.rollbackDesc: Are you sure you want to rollback to version {{version}}? This will modify table structures.

aiDesigner.title: AI Schema Designer
aiDesigner.placeholder:
Describe your data model in natural language...

Example: I need a blog platform with users, posts, comments, and tags. Users can have multiple posts, posts can have multiple comments and tags.
aiDesigner.noTablesGenerated: No tables were generated. Try a more detailed description.
aiDesigner.refinePlaceholder: Add more details to refine the schema...

createDialog.title: Create Table
createDialog.uuidPkHint: Adds an "id" column with a unique identifier generated automatically for each record. Recommended for most tables.
createDialog.timestampsHint: Adds created_at and updated_at columns that are set automatically when a record is created or modified.
createDialog.columnRequired: At least one column is required
createDialog.createEndpointsHint: Auto-create endpoints to read, add, update and delete records via HTTP. You'll need to create an API key in Settings > API Tokens to use them.
createDialog.nullHint: Allow empty values (NULL) in this column
createDialog.nullOnHint: Empty values allowed. Click to make required.
createDialog.nullOffHint: Field is required. Click to allow empty values.
createDialog.uniqueHint: Every value in this column must be different
createDialog.uniqueOnHint: Unique constraint is on. Click to remove.

yamlImport.title: Import Schema (YAML)
yamlImport.singleTableOnly: Only one table allowed here. For multiple tables, use "Import Schema" on the tables page.
yamlImport.previewDesc: {{tables}} table(s), {{fks}} foreign key(s), {{indexes}} index(es) will be created
yamlImport.typeMismatch: Type mismatch: {{column}} is {{dbType}} in DB, {{yamlType}} in YAML
yamlImport.removedColumn: Column {{column}} exists in DB but not in YAML (won't be deleted)
